title: USEC_USERPASSINFO
text: USEC_USERPASSINFO Provide authentication information. Return Values USEC_SUCCESS Authentication successful, no info returned USEC_INFO Authentication successful, info returned in Error members USEC_ERROR Authentication failed, error returned in Error members Description Provide authentication information, such as ‘Your password will expire in x days’, and so forth. The username is a null-terminated string in Username . The password is a null-terminated string in Passwd . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
